delete.title: Delete Pod
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete the pod {name} in namespace {namespace}?

errors.fetchYamlEdit: Failed to fetch pod YAML for editing
errors.noYaml: No YAML configuration available for this pod

create.title: Create Kubernetes Pod
create.description: Enter your pod configuration in YAML format below.

edit.title: Edit Pod: {name}
edit.description: The current pod configuration is shown below. Make your changes and click Update to apply them.
edit.fieldRestriction: Cannot update this field. Running pods only allow changes to: container images, imagePullPolicy, activeDeadlineSeconds, and tolerations. For other changes, please delete and recreate the pod.
